items.source_text: Create the Go CLI skeleton, command-result JSON envelope, exit-code constants, command dispatch, and repo-local validation baseline needed before product commands are implemented.
Define initial workflow, command-result, proof-strength, cassette, evidence-event, state-binding, redaction-config, and related schema contracts before feature implementation.

Normalized result and failure contracts preserve finding kind, proof strength, boundary status, security relevance, fix target, surface fingerprint, provider/model metadata when applicable, eval mode, and default corpus_eligible: false posture.
notes: This is a local contract and schema requirement only; MVP artifacts must not upload telemetry or private traces by default.

items.source_text: Repository CI validation, required-check metadata, workflow hardening, owner review, action-ref posture, branch protection evidence, and PR lifecycle evidence are established before product implementation continues.

Repo dev guide, architecture guide, 12-level test matrix, coverage policy, security scanner posture, docs/output/release/provenance rules, and architecture boundary rules are propagated into executable planning.
FR1: Product Surface Under Test - Lumyn must frame the customer's API/docs surface as the system under test and agents as probes.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR2: Local-First Operation - The MVP must work without a hosted Lumyn account.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.
Cross-cutting invariant carried forward from foundation work; every mapped product task must preserve it.

items.source_text: FR3: OpenAPI And Local Docs Intake - Lumyn must ingest an OpenAPI file and local docs folder.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR4: Agent-Relevant Source Checks - Lumyn must run structural checks that affect agent tool choice, validation, auth handling, retries, and workflow proof.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR5: Workflow Contract Schema - Lumyn must define a versioned YAML workflow contract with goal, expected outcome, validators, state bindings, context, constraints, and cleanup.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR6: Recording As Authoring - Lumyn must record known-good HTTP traffic and draft workflow contracts, validators, state bindings, cassettes, and cleanup suggestions.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR7: User Approval - Generated workflow contracts must be editable and approved before being treated as stable.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR8: Capture-Time Redaction - Secrets must be redacted before requests, responses, cassettes, traces, or reports are persisted.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR9: Canonical Evidence Schema - Record, replay verify, live verify, eval, validators, and reports must consume canonical evidence events.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.
Cross-cutting invariant carried forward from foundation work; every mapped product task must preserve it.

items.source_text: FR10: Replay Verify - Lumyn must support deterministic replay verification without network calls.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR11: API State Validation - Lumyn must support `api_state` validators and explicit proof-gap reporting when no reliable read-back exists.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR12: Trace Assertions - Lumyn must support a limited deterministic `trace_assertion` vocabulary.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR13: Local Trace And Report - Lumyn must produce a local JSON trace and HTML report.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR14: Stable CLI Output - Lumyn must support stable exit codes and `--json`.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.
Cross-cutting invariant carried forward from foundation work; every mapped product task must preserve it.

items.source_text: FR15: Live Known-Path Verify - Lumyn must support live known-path verification against sandbox.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR16: Cleanup And Sandbox Hygiene - Lumyn must support cleanup steps, run IDs, idempotency where practical, and basic orphan detection.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR17: Action Boundary - Lumyn must support a first-class action-boundary object and deterministic boundary checks.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR18: Boundary Failure Semantics - Lumyn must fail a workflow when expected final state passes but configured action boundaries are violated.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR19: Live Agent Eval - Lumyn must support live agent probes using OpenAI-compatible provider adapters, including custom base_url local endpoints, and Anthropic provider adapters behind a pluggable provider interface.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR20: Eval Context Modes - Lumyn eval must support `surface_only` and `contract_assisted` modes.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR21: Eval Repetition - Lumyn eval must support repeated runs and report pass rate instead of hiding stochastic behavior.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR22: Model Pinning - Lumyn must record provider, model, temperature, and model snapshot where available.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR23: Baseline Comparison - Lumyn eval must compare against a saved baseline where configured and label drift risk when model snapshots are unavailable.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR24: Least-Privilege Agent Runs - Lumyn eval must default to stateless local runs, explicit context, allowlisted env vars, and no ambient workspace access.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: FR25: Portable Artifacts - Workflow contracts, cassettes, traces, reports, and baselines must remain useful outside a hosted service.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR1: Fast First Value - A technical user should run `init`, `check`, and open bundled traces in under 10 minutes.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR2: Fast First Workflow - A technical user should record and replay-verify one simple workflow in under 30 minutes.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR3: Deterministic Replay - Repeated replay verification on unchanged artifacts must produce the same result.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR4: Proof Honesty - Reports must clearly distinguish confirmed read-back proof, trace-only evidence, and proof gaps.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR5: Security - Redaction must happen before artifact persistence. If a value cannot be confidently redacted, Lumyn must fail closed: mark the artifact unsafe to persist rather than write a possibly-unredacted secret. Silent persistence of an unrecognized secret is a trust bug, not an edge case.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR6: Local Privacy - Lumyn must not send specs, docs, traces, cassettes, or API responses to Lumyn by default.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.
Cross-cutting invariant carried forward from foundation work; every mapped product task must preserve it.

items.source_text: NFR7: Contract Readability - Workflow YAML must be understandable by engineers without a custom UI.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR8: Parser-First - OpenAPI checks should use structured parsers and schema-aware libraries where possible.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR9: Debuggable Errors - Errors must include file, path, command, object, or line references where possible.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.
Cross-cutting invariant carried forward from foundation work; every mapped product task must preserve it.

items.source_text: NFR10: Cost Visibility - Live evals must show token and estimated cost information.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR11: Stochastic Honesty - Eval must report run counts and pass rates. It must not hide variability behind a deterministic-looking boolean.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR12: Artifact Stability - Schemas and artifacts must be versioned.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.
Cross-cutting invariant carried forward from foundation work; every mapped product task must preserve it.

items.source_text: NFR13: Inference Humility - Recorder-generated validators, bindings, boundaries, and cleanup suggestions must be confidence-labeled.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: NFR14: No Dashboard Dependency - The MVP must explain value through local CLI output and local reports.
notes: Requirement-level closure item added from PRD FR/NFR section; close via mapped task evidence.

items.source_text: At least 70% of drafted assertions, read-back candidates, and state bindings are accepted without edit on simple REST/OpenAPI workflows.
notes: Quantified recorder quality gate requires measured corpus evidence before MVP closure.
Measure only recorder confidence claims against strong-spec and weak-spec simple REST/OpenAPI fixtures; needs_user_input and coverage_gap are non-claims.

items.source_text: `lumyn init` writes valid config and source-check artifacts.
`lumyn check` emits a workflow-relevant source finding with a concrete reference.
`lumyn record create_customer_with_readback` writes workflow YAML, cassette, trace, and state bindings.
Generated workflow YAML is readable and editable without a custom UI.
`lumyn verify --strategy replay` is deterministic on repeated runs.
Strong-proof workflow reports `confirmed by API read-back`.
Proof-gap workflow reports `not provable from current surface`.
Local HTML report identifies the fix target.
Standard auth headers and configured sensitive fields are redacted in all artifacts.
notes: Redaction must be proven by fixtures and fail-closed checks.

items.source_text: Bundled static traces open without model key, sandbox, or hosted account.
`lumyn demo` opens the bundled agent-failure and proof-gap reports with no install, model key, sandbox, or hosted account.
`lumyn demo` includes bundled examples that show proof-gap and boundary-violation/safety findings without requiring a hosted account, model key, or sandbox.
`lumyn verify --strategy live` executes the recorded path against sandbox.
notes: Live sandbox/network execution requires approved capability grants before closure.

items.source_text: Live read-back confirms expected state on the happy path.
notes: Live sandbox/network execution requires approved capability grants before closure.

items.source_text: A changed sandbox response causes a verification failure.
notes: Live sandbox/network execution requires approved capability grants before closure.

items.source_text: Cleanup removes created resources or reports orphaned resources.
notes: Live sandbox/network execution requires approved capability grants before closure.

items.source_text: A forbidden path call fails the workflow even when final state passes.
Request and write-operation budgets are enforced.
The GitHub Action runs `verify` in CI and posts a PR-comment summary naming changed sources and the workflows they affect.

`lumyn share` re-runs redaction at export and produces a single self-contained artifact of a trace that opens with no Lumyn install or account; it fails closed if any value cannot be confidently redacted.
Action-boundary violations that indicate scope escalation, data exposure risk, or out-of-policy action are labeled safety/security-relevant and fail even when final state passes.
notes: This preserves the enterprise safety finding without positioning the MVP as a broad agent security platform.

items.source_text: CI, JUnit, and PR-comment output surface completion result, proof strength, boundary status, safety/security finding count, and fix target.
`lumyn eval` runs OpenAI-compatible provider/model adapters, including custom base_url local endpoints, and Anthropic provider/model adapters when configured.
notes: Provider credentials for OpenAI-compatible, local base_url, and Anthropic adapters require explicit approval before live closure.

items.source_text: Eval supports `surface_only` mode.
Eval supports `contract_assisted` mode.
Eval reports run count and pass rate.
Eval reports selected endpoints and wrong turns.
Eval reports cost and duration.
Eval writes a local trace/report.
Eval compares to a saved baseline where configured.
Eval labels baseline drift risk when model snapshots are unavailable.
Eval is diagnostic by default unless an explicit gate is configured.

Eval emits normalized local failure events for wrong turns, boundary violations, proof gaps, docs/API ambiguity, model-specific failures, stochastic variance, cost/duration, provider/model/eval mode, and fix target.
notes: Events remain local/private by default and are corpus-ready only for a future opt-in workflow.

items.source_text: First trace opened in under 5 minutes.
notes: Automated first-session smoke must record elapsed time and command evidence before closure.

items.source_text: `init` plus `check` completed in under 10 minutes.
notes: Automated first-session smoke must record elapsed time and command evidence before closure.

items.source_text: First workflow recorded and replay-verified in under 30 minutes.
notes: Automated first-session smoke must record elapsed time and command evidence before closure.

items.source_text: Generated workflow contract accepted with limited edits.
notes: Activation metrics require timed/manual evidence or approved deferral before release closure.

items.source_text: User records more than one workflow.
notes: Product-pull signal requires human/product evidence or approved deferral; it must not be auto-closed by implementation tests.

items.source_text: User adds `verify --strategy replay` to CI.
notes: Product-pull signal requires human/product evidence or approved deferral; it must not be auto-closed by implementation tests.

items.source_text: User configures live sandbox verify.
notes: Product-pull signal requires human/product evidence or approved deferral; it must not be auto-closed by implementation tests.

items.source_text: User asks to run live eval before an API/docs release.
notes: Product-pull signal requires human/product evidence or approved deferral; it must not be auto-closed by implementation tests.

items.source_text: User fixes docs, OpenAPI descriptions, auth guidance, endpoint ambiguity, or read-back gaps based on Lumyn output.
notes: Product-pull signal requires human/product evidence or approved deferral; it must not be auto-closed by implementation tests.
